title: raputia alba
intro: Raputia alba, also known as White Noyau, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae, native to Central and South America. This plant has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Raputia alba include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Raputia alba typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
